deviations.summary: User requested 3 runs (Tue/Thu/Sat) instead of plan v4.0's 1 run (Sat). Coach pushed back citing wellness data (HRV ↓14%, RHR +5, readiness avg 56) but user chose to proceed. Compromise: all 3 runs lowered to Z1 (102-130) instead of Z2 (131-143), shorter distance (3km each = 9km total vs 14.5km W18 = -38% volume). Z1 = active recovery, not aerobic build.
